business.name: Madina Builders Mcr
business.tagline: Reliable Gas Engineers Serving Greater Manchester

sample_reviews.author: Ahmed R
sample_reviews.text: Excellent service from Madina Builders. Fitted a new boiler quickly and tidily. Very professional and reasonably priced. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah T
sample_reviews.text: Called them out for a gas safety check on my rental property. Arrived on time, thorough job, certificate issued same day. Will use again.

sample_reviews.author: James K
sample_reviews.text: Good honest gas engineers. Fixed my boiler when another company said it needed replacing. Saved me a lot of money. Happy customer.

brand.usp: Madina Builders Mcr are Gas Safe registered engineers bringing honest, reliable boiler and gas services to homes and landlords across Greater Manchester. We pride ourselves on fair pricing and quality workmanship every time.
brand.hero_headline: Trusted Gas Engineers Across Greater Manchester
brand.about_paragraph: We are Madina Builders Mcr, a Gas Safe registered gas engineering business proudly serving homeowners and landlords throughout Manchester and the surrounding areas. We specialise in boiler installations, servicing, repairs, and gas safety certificates, giving you complete peace of mind. When you call us, you get a reliable, honest engineer who turns up on time and gets the job done right.
